name: Robert & Patricia Wallace
key_complexity: Complex investment income, trust K-1, multi-broker 1099-B with cost basis issues, RMD tracking, QBI from trust, charitable giving substantiation
narrative: Robert and Patricia are retired with complex investment income. Their brokerage 1099-Bs come from three different firms in different formats (Fidelity PDF, Schwab CSV, Vanguard Excel). They have a family trust K-1, charitable donation receipts including photos of handwritten church contribution records, medical expense tracking in Excel, and a property tax bill photographed from the county mailing. Patricia keeps handwritten notes about their charitable giving. This persona is the format-diversity stress test — testing PDF form extraction, multi-format financial table interpretation, image OCR on receipts and handwritten notes, and complex cross-referencing across documents.
